# Spotlight & System Search Integration

> **Category:** macOS Integration
> **Type:** New Capability · **Priority:** Medium
> **Milestone:** M5 · **Status:** 🔲 Not started

---

## Problem

Conversation history and generated files are invisible to Spotlight — completely siloed within the app. "Find that financial analysis I ran last Tuesday" requires opening Atelier and scrolling through sessions.

## Solution

**CoreSpotlight integration**: index conversations, generated files, and session summaries. Users find past work system-wide via Spotlight, and tapping a result opens the relevant session directly.

A Spotlight Importer for Atelier's session files makes conversation history searchable alongside every other document on the Mac.
